CustomField.description:
FH:FC Ratio to be used for MR calculations; This can be current month, previous year 12 mos, rolling 12 months, lease anniversary 12 mos
From MR Reconciliation Studio- 1. When generating MR reconciliation type of utilization, we are creating or updating FH:FC ratio records. 2. We are updating new FH:FC ration value on Supplement rent if old and new ration percentage is not blank and greater than reconcilation schedule record's Ratio Variance (%) field.
On Supplement Rent Utilization record- Before inserting and before updating a record- 1. If Utilization Type not equal to "MR Reconciliation" and Assumed FH:FC Ratio field is blank on SR Utilization record then we are using this(Ratio Current) field value in calculation
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculate automatically the ratio of the Actual and Adjusted utilizations. Also allow to manually enter the Ratio
CustomField.label: Ratio Current
